era_context: Middle Bronze Age; Hyksos 15th Dynasty in Egypt; Old Babylonian period in decline in Mesopotamia; Shang dynasty in China; Middle Minoan period in Crete. Regional trade and diplomatic networks are active, though large-scale empires are fragmenting.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: This year is not documented in surviving sources. The Bronze Age historical record does not preserve year-by-year narratives for most years. Our knowledge of this period comes from regnal lists, archaeological stratigraphy, and occasional inscriptions, none of which provide specific events for -1768 BCE.
